---

Thanks for taking the time to suggest something! cozy-kit stays small by design, so not every idea fits — but every suggestion gets read.

## What problem does this solve?

What are you trying to do that cozy-kit doesn't help with today?

## Current workaround

How do you handle this today without the feature?

## What would you like to see?

Your idea. Doesn't have to be fully formed.

---

### Quick checks

- [ ] This fits the "cozy utilities for everyday scripts" vibe (not a web framework, database, etc.)
- [ ] I've checked that this isn't already possible with existing cozy-kit features
- [ ] I'd be open to trying a pull request for this
